text.title: Tweet Thread Launch Template Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the path from preconditions to a valid spec artefact.

example.title: Happy-path spec artefact
example.description: Indie hackers shipping on Product Hunt or solo launches who keep writing the launch thread on launch morning under pressure with no template discipline. An operator with all prerequisites in place runs the methodology; outcome is a validated spec matching the output contract.
example.code: { "launch_id": "<launch_id-value>", "operator": "ruslan@faion.net", "tweets": "[/* see template — populated per Prerequisites */]", "demo_gif_url": "<demo_gif_url-value>", "hook_variants_tested": "[/* see template — populated per Prerequisites */]", "social_proof_quote": "{ ... }", "scheduled_for": "<scheduled_for-value>", "version": "1.1.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }
example.trace: Inputs satisfied → decision-tree run branch fires → rule r1-seven-tweet-shape drives the artefact shape → self-check PASS → validator exit 0 → returned to caller.
